title: CodeValue
description: A type to hold the value of the code in a codelist

value.description: The value of the code, e.g. USNY

description.description: A description of the meaning of the code, e.g. New York City, USA

source.description: Where the code was defined,e.g. ISDA, FpML, Bloomberg

deprecatedDate.description: When the code ceased to be valid for new uses
